name: Pure Hands
mission: Pure Hands, Inc.s mission is preservation of human lives by elimination of hunger through detection, prevention and treatment of malnutrition. Pure Hands, Inc. tackles the underlying causes of malnutrition and poverty during and after emergency situations
theoryOfChange: Providing immediate relief (food/medicine) while simultaneously rebuilding infrastructure (hospitals/schools) and providing sustainable livelihoods (livestock/Waqf) to mitigate the collapse of Yemeni society.

impact_evidence.evidence_grade_explanation: The charity tracks <cite id="15">specific outcome metrics</cite> and has been verified for its evidence-based approach by third-party evaluators.
impact_evidence.theory_of_change_summary: Pure Hands utilizes a <cite id="16">documented theory of change</cite> focusing on immediate relief followed by sustainable livelihood and capacity building.
impact_evidence.why_evidence_matters: In conflict zones, evidence ensures that aid is not only delivered but effectively improves health and nutrition outcomes.

long_term_outlook.room_for_funding_explanation: Given the <cite id="5">24.3% revenue growth</cite> and the scale of the Yemen crisis, the organization can absorb significant additional capital.

strengths.detail: The organization directs a <cite id="6">program expense ratio of 98.2%</cite> toward its mission, supported by a <cite id="7">fundraising cost of only $0.02 per $1 raised</cite>.
Pure Hands is <cite id="10">verified as Zakat-eligible</cite> and serves critical asnaf categories including <cite id="11">the poor (fuqara) and needy (masakin)</cite> in Yemen.
The charity holds a <cite id="12">Candid Platinum Seal of Transparency</cite> and an <cite id="13">overall score of 89.89.75/100 from Charity Navigator</cite>.

strengths_deep_dive: Pure Hands demonstrates a sophisticated operational model that maximizes donor contributions. By maintaining <cite id="14">100% independent board members</cite>, the organization ensures objective oversight of its <cite id="4">$184.8 million in annual revenue</cite>. Their impact is verified through <cite id="15">outcome tracking for key metrics</cite>, and they have established a <cite id="16">documented theory of change</cite> that guides their interventions in food security and medical care. This level of transparency is reflected in their <cite id="17">perfect score of 100 for Culture & Community</cite> from Charity Navigator.
rich_narrative.summary: Pure Hands Inc. is a specialized humanitarian organization dedicated to alleviating the humanitarian crisis in Yemen through <cite id="1">relief, livelihood, and capacity-building services</cite>. Since its founding in <cite id="2">2013</cite>, the organization has scaled significantly to address one of the world's most acute humanitarian emergencies, focusing on <cite id="3">food security, health, WASH (water, sanitation, and hygiene), and shelter</cite>. In the 2023 fiscal year, the charity reported a <cite id="4">total revenue of $184,894,296</cite>, reflecting a robust <cite id="5">3-year revenue CAGR of 24.3%</cite>. A defining characteristic of Pure Hands is its exceptional financial efficiency; the organization maintains a <cite id="6">program expense ratio of 98.2%</cite>, ensuring that resources are directed toward frontline services. This efficiency is further evidenced by a <cite id="7">fundraising efficiency of $0.02 per $1 raised</cite>, which is among the lowest in the humanitarian sector. Beyond emergency relief, the organization facilitates <cite id="8">domestic and foreign grants</cite>, totaling over $10.5 million, to support local implementing partners and community infrastructure. While the organization demonstrates high impact through direct service delivery, it operates with <cite id="9">minimal financial reserves</cite>, maintaining only 0.4 months of working capital, which necessitates continuous donor support to sustain its large-scale operations in high-conflict zones.
